title: lotoxalis barrelieri
intro: Lotoxalis barrelieri, also known as the Barrelier's plant or yellow-flowered sandvine, is a perennial vine native to the southeastern United States. The medicinal properties of Lotoxalis barrelieri lie in its roots and leaves, which contain alkaloids with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of using this plant include the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as a natural diuretic to aid in the removal of excess fluids from the body. Herbal preparations of Lotoxalis barrelieri can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
